channel.title: GinkgoQ
channel.description: Technical writing on AI systems, domain intelligence, speech AI, RAG, agents, datasets, models, and production AI infrastructure.

item.title: Why model performance doesn't determine system reliability
item.description: Benchmarks measure different things than production. Building trustworthy AI requires evaluation, fallback logic, and system design.

item.title: Building reliable extraction pipelines for document understanding
item.description: How structured validation, confidence scoring, and observability turn document AI from prototype to production.

item.title: Beyond RAG: building domain intelligence systems
item.description: Retrieval is just the foundation. Production AI systems need extraction, validation, confidence scoring, and domain reasoning.
